Best AI Coding Assistants (2026)

AI pair-programmers that autocomplete, explain, and help debug code inside your editor.

Claude by Anthropic

An AI assistant known for careful reasoning, long context windows, and strong coding ability.

✅ Free tier available — Free plan available; Pro $20/mo; Max plans from $100/mo

GitHub Copilot by GitHub (Microsoft)

AI pair programmer that autocompletes and explains code inside your editor.

✅ Free tier available — Free tier for individuals; paid plans from $10/mo

Cursor by Anysphere

An AI-first code editor built around chat, autocomplete, and codebase-aware edits.

✅ Free tier available — Free (Hobby) tier available; Pro from $20/mo

AI Tool Finder — independent AI tool reviews and comparisons. Some links may be affiliate links, at no extra cost to you.
